title: nummularia radicans
intro: Nummularia radicans, also known as Annona squamosa, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Annonaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Nummularia radicans include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of extracts, oils, and teas, which are often used to treat skin conditions, respiratory problems, and other ailments.
